title: fragaria vesca proles semperflorens
intro: Fragaria vesca proles semperflorens, commonly known as the ever-bearing wood strawberry or woodland strawberry, is a perennial plant species within the genus Fragaria. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, astringent, and diuretic properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca proles semperflorens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support urinary tract health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
